data.content: Strengthened the completed-knot cue in the Setlist chart without changing active knot styling. Shipped cells now de-emphasize the id row with line-through, italic, and non-bold text, soften the title panel to match, and slightly lighten the surrounding border while keeping the completion check marker. Verified with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. Branch: worktree-foolery-setlist-completed-cue. Commit: 6a47690b8d67.
